params.args: The font arguments specifying variation position, palette index, and palette overrides.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> reflecting the requested customizations.
fields.summary: Creates a copy of this typeface customized with the specified font arguments.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette to activate.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> using the specified palette.
fields.summary: Creates a copy of this typeface using the specified color palette.

params.position: The variation axis coordinates that define the desired design position.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> positioned at the specified variation coordinates.
fields.summary: Creates a copy of this typeface at the specified variation design position.
Gets a typeface representing an empty (no-glyph) font.
fields.value: A shared <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface" /> instance with no glyphs.

params.axes: The span to receive the variation axis definitions.

fields.returns: The number of variation axes written into <paramref name="axes" />.
fields.summary: Gets the variation axis definitions into the provided span.

params.coordinates: The span to receive the variation position coordinates.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written into <paramref name="coordinates" />.
fields.summary: Gets the current variation design position into the provided span.
Gets a value indicating whether this typeface contains no glyphs.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the typeface has a glyph count of zero; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in this typeface.
fields.value: The count of variation axes, or zero if the typeface is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets the variation axis definitions for this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values describing each axis.

fields.summary: Gets the current variation design position of this typeface.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values representing the current position.

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation design position coordinates for this typeface.
fields.value: The number of coordinates in the current design position, or zero if not a variable font.
